title: Payment provider circuit breaker badge
description: Small badge showing circuit-breaker state for a payment provider config. When circuit_breaker_open_until is null: green 'Closed'. When circuit_breaker_open_until > now: red 'Open until <time>'. When circuit_breaker_open_until <= now: amber 'Half-open (probing)'.

content.$expr: props.openUntil ? ('Circuit breaker open until ' + props.openUntil + '. Consecutive failures: ' + (props.consecutiveFailures || 0)) : 'Circuit breaker closed. Provider healthy.'
